AR1.justification: Routed the triage into daybook/2026-05-17.md with explicit rationale that decisions/observations should not be invented from a single cold session, and explicitly avoided mutating followups.md.

AR2.justification: Cold-pickup triage, not a multi-step runbook.

AR3.justification: References are relative bare filenames per the methodology and the daybook file written uses the ISO-dated convention; all resolve.

AR4.justification: New ISO-dated daybook with Intent/Log/Handoff/Generated-by, no in-place mutation of historical surfaces — re-run stays coherent.
